text:
From: Hanson TR, Mert <turkey@hansoncarriers.com>
Sent: Friday, September 12, 2025 12:38:28 PM
To: turkey <turkey@hansoncarriers.com>
Cc: chartering <chartering@hansoncarriers.com>
Subject: HANSON ISTANBUL - ORDERS

100% BOOKED/FIRM
ACCNT HANSON CARRIERS (ISTANBUL BRANCH)

1. SUPRA/UMAX/PMAX

1 TCT VIA CONTINENT WITH GRAINS ABT 35 DAYS WOG

DELY PASS GIB/SKAW RANGE

REDELY EMED RGE(INT EGYPT MED)

L/C PPT ONW/ANY SEPT

2. SUPRA/UMAX

1 TCT VIA UKRAINE WITH GRAINS ABT 25 DYS WOG

DELY PASS CANAKKALE OR BSEA

REDELY CONTI/BALTIC RGE

L/C 15/30 SEPT

3. HANDY-MAX/SUPRA-MAX/UMX - PERIOD

DEL MED/BSEA

DUR LLEGS OR SP UPTO 6/8 MOS

LAYCAN ANY SEPT

REDELY WW

EXTRA PREMIUM FOR TRADING/CGO FLEXIBLILITY (UKR/RUS/GOA)

MAY TRY FIXED OR INDEX LINKED RATE

ALL ADD COM 3.75%
